Γ: neg_ctx
A0, B: pre_ty pos
v1: whn Γ `+ A0
v2: whn Γ `+ B
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B)
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut pos (Whn (TenR v1 v2)) (Whn (TenL c))) Δ
         a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut pos (Whn (TenR v1 v2)) (Whn (TenL c)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A0, B: pre_ty pos
v1: whn Γ `+ A0
v2: whn Γ `+ B
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B)
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B) c
           (Δ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B) (a_shift2 a)) Δ
        ₂[ v1 `ᵥ⊛ a, v2 `ᵥ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B) c Γ ₂[ v1, v2]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      
Γ: neg_ctx
A0, B: pre_ty pos
v1: whn Γ `+ A0
v2: whn Γ `+ B
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B)
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval ((c ₜ⊛ ₂[ upg_vp v1, upg_vp v2]) ₜ⊛ a))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A0 ▶ₓ `+ B) c Γ ₂[ v1, v2]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      apply CIH.
    
Γ: neg_ctx
A4, B3: pre_ty pos
v: whn Γ `+ A4
c1: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A4)
c2: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ B3)
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut pos (Whn (OrR1 v)) (Whn (OrL c1 c2))) Δ
         a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut pos (Whn (OrR1 v)) (Whn (OrL c1 c2)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx

a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0

     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `+ A4)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A4) c1 (Δ ▶ₓ `+ A4)
           (a_shift1 a)) Δ ₁[ v `ᵥ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A4) c1 Γ ₁[ v]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut pos (Whn (NegPR k)) (Whn (NegPL c))) Δ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut pos (Whn (NegPR k)) (Whn (NegPL c)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A14: pre_ty neg
k: whn Γ `- A14
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14)
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `- A14)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14) c (Δ ▶ₓ `- A14)
           (a_shift1 a)) Δ ₁[ k `ᵥ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14) c Γ ₁[ k]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

Γ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty neg
x: term Γ `+ A
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ (`- A) †)
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))

a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux (s_subst Γ (Cut neg x (Mu c)) Δ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->

                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in

  | inr y => RetF y

    match eval_aux (Cut neg x (Mu c)) with

          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match

          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)

          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let

                 return

                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y

  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval

                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in

(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (Cut neg ((t `ₜ⊛ ₁[ upg_vn (RecR t)]) `ₜ⊛ a)
        (Whn (k `ᵥ⊛ a))))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (Cut neg (t `ₜ⊛ ₁[ RecR t]) (Whn k)))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      apply CIH.
    
Γ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty neg
i: Γ ∋ `+ A
k: whn Γ `- A
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ (Cut neg (Whn (Var i)) (Whn k)) Δ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux (Cut neg (Whn (Var i)) (Whn k))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty neg
i: Γ ∋ `+ A
k: whn Γ `- A
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_map ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  (eval (Cut neg (a `+ A i) (Whn (k `ᵥ⊛ a))))
  (eval
     (Cut neg (var (s_var_upg i) `ₜ⊛ a)
        (Whn
           ((p_of_w_0n A k
             `ᵥ⊛ nf_args (s_var_upg i ⋅ v_split_n k))
            `ᵥ⊛ a))))

      
Γ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty neg
i: Γ ∋ `+ A
k: whn Γ `- A
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_map ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  (eval (Cut neg (a `+ A i) (Whn (k `ᵥ⊛ a))))
  (eval
     (Cut neg (var (s_var_upg i) `ₜ⊛ a)
        (Whn
           ((p_of_w_0n A k `ᵥ⊛ p_dom_of_w_0n A k)
            `ᵥ⊛ a))))

      now rewrite (refold_id_aux A k).
    
Γ: neg_ctx
c: state Γ
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ (Cut neg (Whn (BotR c)) (Whn BotL)) Δ
         a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux (Cut neg (Whn (BotR c)) (Whn BotL))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 cbn; econstructor; refold_eval; apply CIH.
    
Γ: neg_ctx
A4, B3: pre_ty neg
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3)
k1: whn Γ `- A4
k2: whn Γ `- B3
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut neg (Whn (ParR c)) (Whn (ParL k1 k2))) Δ
         a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut neg (Whn (ParR c)) (Whn (ParL k1 k2)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A4, B3: pre_ty neg
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3)
k1: whn Γ `- A4
k2: whn Γ `- B3
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3) c
           (Δ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3) (a_shift2 a)) Δ
        ₂[ k1 `ᵥ⊛ a, k2 `ᵥ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3) c Γ ₂[ k1, k2]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      
Γ: neg_ctx
A4, B3: pre_ty neg
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3)
k1: whn Γ `- A4
k2: whn Γ `- B3
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))

(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval ((c ₜ⊛ ₂[ upg_kn k1, upg_kn k2]) ₜ⊛ a))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A4 ▶ₓ `- B3) c Γ ₂[ k1, k2]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      apply CIH.
    
Γ: neg_ctx
A9, B8: pre_ty neg
c1: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A9)
c2: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- B8)
k: whn Γ `- A9

R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut neg (Whn (AndR c1 c2)) (Whn (AndL1 k)))
         Δ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut neg (Whn (AndR c1 c2)) (Whn (AndL1 k)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end

A9, B8: pre_ty neg
c1: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A9)
c2: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- B8)

Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))

a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ

  (eval
     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `- A9)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A9) c1 (Δ ▶ₓ `- A9)
           (a_shift1 a)) Δ ₁[ k `ᵥ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A9) c1 Γ ₁[ k]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      
Γ: neg_ctx
A9, B8: pre_ty neg
c1: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A9)
c2: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- B8)
k: whn Γ `- A9
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval ((c1 ₜ⊛ ₁[ upg_kn k]) ₜ⊛ a))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A9) c1 Γ ₁[ k]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      apply CIH.
    
Γ: neg_ctx
A10, B9: pre_ty neg
c1: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A10)
c2: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- B9)
k: whn Γ `- B9
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut neg (Whn (AndR c1 c2)) (Whn (AndL2 k)))
         Δ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut neg (Whn (AndR c1 c2)) (Whn (AndL2 k)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A10, B9: pre_ty neg
c1: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A10)
c2: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- B9)
k: whn Γ `- B9
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `- B9)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- B9) c2 (Δ ▶ₓ `- B9)
           (a_shift1 a)) Δ ₁[ k `ᵥ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- B9) c2 Γ ₁[ k]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      
Γ: neg_ctx
A10, B9: pre_ty neg
c1: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A10)
c2: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- B9)
k: whn Γ `- B9
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval ((c2 ₜ⊛ ₁[ upg_kn k]) ₜ⊛ a))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- B9) c2 Γ ₁[ k]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      apply CIH.
    
Γ: neg_ctx
A14: pre_ty pos
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14)
x: term Γ `- A14
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut neg (Whn (ShiftNR c)) (Whn (ShiftNL x)))
         Δ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut neg (Whn (ShiftNR c)) (Whn (ShiftNL x)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A14: pre_ty pos
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14)
x: term Γ `- A14
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `- A14)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14) c (Δ ▶ₓ `- A14)
           (a_shift1 a)) Δ ₁[ x `ₜ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14) c Γ ₁[ x]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      
Γ: neg_ctx
A14: pre_ty pos
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14)
x: term Γ `- A14
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval ((c ₜ⊛ ₁[ upg_kp x]) ₜ⊛ a))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `- A14) c Γ ₁[ x]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      apply CIH.
    
Γ: neg_ctx
A18: pre_ty pos
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A18)
v: whn Γ `+ A18
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eqF ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst Γ
         (Cut neg (Whn (NegNR c)) (Whn (NegNL v))) Δ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state Δ ->
                itree ∅ₑ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                   (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
             fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match
      eval_aux
        (Cut neg (Whn (NegNR c)) (Whn (NegNL v)))
    with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state Γ ->
                  itree ∅ₑ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state Γ) +ᵢ
                     (fun _ : T1 => nf Γ)) x0) in
               fun c : state Γ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst Γ
             (p_app (var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) Δ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state Δ ->
                    itree ∅ₑ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state Δ) +ᵢ
                       (fun _ : T1 => nf Δ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state Δ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ ->
              itree ∅ₑ
                (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ)
                x) in
           fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
           eval
             (s_subst Γ
                (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) Δ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A18: pre_ty pos
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A18)
v: whn Γ `+ A18
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (Δ ▶ₓ `+ A18)
        (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A18) c (Δ ▶ₓ `+ A18)
           (a_shift1 a)) Δ ₁[ v `ᵥ⊛ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A18) c Γ ₁[ v]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      
Γ: neg_ctx
A18: pre_ty pos
c: state (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A18)
v: whn Γ `+ A18
Δ: neg_ctx
R: relᵢ
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
  (itree ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => Obs.nf obs_op val_n Δ))
CIH: forall (c : state Γ) (a : Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ),
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst Γ c Δ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
eval (s_subst Γ (p_app (var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) Δ a)))
a: Γ =[ val_n ]> Δ
it_eq_t ∅ₑ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval ((c ₜ⊛ ₁[ upg_vp v]) ₜ⊛ a))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval (s_subst (Γ ▶ₓ `+ A18) c Γ ₁[ v]))
     (fun y : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ =>
      eval
        (s_subst Γ
           (p_app (var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) Δ a)))

      apply CIH.

Next we prove that evaluating a normal form is just returning this normal form. This goes by approximately induction on observations.

  
forall (Γ : neg_ctx) (u : Obs.nf obs_op val_n Γ),
Machine.eval (emb u) ≋ ret_delay u
 
Γ: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: Γ ∋ A
o: obs_op A
γ: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
eval (Cut' (var i) (o `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)

    
A: pre_ty neg
Γ: neg_ctx
A0: ty
i: Γ ∋ A0
o: pat A0 †
γ: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
eqargs: {| pr1 := `+ A; pr2 := PVarP A |} =
{| pr1 := A0 †; pr2 := o |}
H0: `+ A = A0 †
H1: `+ A,' PVarP A = A0 †,' o
eval
  (Cut' (var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
           whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in Var Ctx.top `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
A0: pre_ty pos
Γ: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: Γ ∋ A
o: pat A †
γ: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
eqargs: {| pr1 := `- A0; pr2 := PVarN A0 |} =
{| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}
H0: `- A0 = A †
H1: `- A0,' PVarN A0 = A †,' o
eval
  (Cut' (var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
           whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in Var Ctx.top `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
Γ: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: Γ ∋ A
o: pat A †
γ: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
eqargs: {| pr1 := `+ 1; pr2 := POne |} =
{| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}
H0: `+ 1 = A †
H1: `+ 1,' POne = A †,' o
eval
  (Cut' (var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
           whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in OneR `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
Γ: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: Γ ∋ A
o: pat A †
γ: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
eqargs: {| pr1 := `- ⊥; pr2 := PBot |} =
{| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}
H0: `- ⊥ = A †
H1: `- ⊥,' PBot = A †,' o
eval
  (Cut' (var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
           whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in BotL `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
A1, B: pre_ty pos
p1: pat `+ A1
p2: pat `+ B
H: forall (Γ : neg_ctx) (A : ty) 
  (i : Γ ∋ A) (o : pat A †)
  (γ : dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := `+ A1; pr2 := p1 |} =
            {| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
     whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in p1 = o ->
eval (Cut' (var i) (o `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
H0: forall (Γ : neg_ctx) (A : ty) 
  (i : Γ ∋ A) (o : pat A †)
  (γ : dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := `+ B; pr2 := p2 |} =
            {| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
     whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in p2 = o ->
eval (Cut' (var i) (o `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
Γ: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: Γ ∋ A
o: pat A †
γ: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
eqargs: {| pr1 := `+ (A1 ⊗ B); pr2 := PTen p1 p2 |} =
{| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}
H2: `+ (A1 ⊗ B) = A †
H3: `+ (A1 ⊗ B),' PTen p1 p2 = A †,' o
eval
  (Cut' (var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
           whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in
      TenR (p1 `ᵥ⊛ᵣ r_cover_l cover_cat)
        (p2 `ᵥ⊛ᵣ r_cover_r cover_cat) `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)

p2: pat `- B0

  (γ : dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := `- A2; pr2 := p1 |} =
            {| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
     whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in p1 = o ->
eval (Cut' (var i) (o `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)

H1: `+ (↓ A7),' PShiftP A7 = (`- (↓ A7)) †,' o
eval
  (Cut' (var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
           whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in ShiftPR (Whn (Var Ctx.top)) `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)

     whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]

≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)

    eqargs in p = o ->
eval (Cut' (var i) (o `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
Γ: neg_ctx
i: Γ ∋ `+ (A6 & B4)
γ: dom (PAnd2 p) =[ val_n ]> Γ
H2: `- (A6 & B4),' PAnd2 p =
(`+ (A6 & B4)) †,' PAnd2 p
nf_eq (s_var_upg i ⋅ v_split_n (AndL2 (p `ᵥ⊛ γ)))
  (i ⋅ PAnd2 p ⦇ γ ⦈)
A7: pre_ty neg
Γ: neg_ctx
i: Γ ∋ `- (↓ A7)
γ: dom (PShiftP A7) =[ val_n ]> Γ
H1: `+ (↓ A7),' PShiftP A7 =
(`- (↓ A7)) †,' PShiftP A7
nf_eq
  (s_var_upg i ⋅ v_split_p (ShiftPR (γ `+ A7 Ctx.top)))
  (i ⋅ PShiftP A7 ⦇ γ ⦈)
A8: pre_ty pos
Γ: neg_ctx
i: Γ ∋ `+ (↑ A8)
γ: dom (PShiftN A8) =[ val_n ]> Γ
H1: `- (↑ A8),' PShiftN A8 =
(`+ (↑ A8)) †,' PShiftN A8
nf_eq
  (s_var_upg i ⋅ v_split_n (ShiftNL (γ `- A8 Ctx.top)))
  (i ⋅ PShiftN A8 ⦇ γ ⦈)
A9: pre_ty neg
p: pat `- A9
H: forall (Γ : neg_ctx) (A : ty) 
  (i : Γ ∋ A) (o : pat A †)
  (γ : dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := `- A9; pr2 := p |} =
            {| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
     whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in p = o ->
eval (Cut' (var i) (o `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
Γ: neg_ctx
i: Γ ∋ `- (⊖ A9)
γ: dom (PNegP p) =[ val_n ]> Γ
H2: `+ (⊖ A9),' PNegP p = (`- (⊖ A9)) †,' PNegP p
nf_eq (s_var_upg i ⋅ v_split_p (NegPR (p `ᵥ⊛ γ)))
  (i ⋅ PNegP p ⦇ γ ⦈)
A10: pre_ty pos
p: pat `+ A10
H: forall (Γ : neg_ctx) (A : ty) 
  (i : Γ ∋ A) (o : pat A †)
  (γ : dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := `+ A10; pr2 := p |} =
            {| pr1 := A †; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun a : ty => pat a) =>
     whn (p_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in p = o ->
eval (Cut' (var i) (o `ᵥ⊛ γ))
≋ ret_delay (i ⋅ o ⦇ γ ⦈)
Γ: neg_ctx
i: Γ ∋ `+ (¬ A10)
γ: dom (PNegN p) =[ val_n ]> Γ
H2: `- (¬ A10),' PNegN p = (`+ (¬ A10)) †,' PNegN p
nf_eq (s_var_upg i ⋅ v_split_n (NegNL (p `ᵥ⊛ γ)))
  (i ⋅ PNegN p ⦇ γ ⦈)

    all: match goal with
         | γ : dom ?p =[val_n]> _ |- _ => first [ exact (nf_eq_split_p _ p γ)
                                              | exact (nf_eq_split_n _ p γ) ]
         end.

Finally we prove the finite chain property. The proof here is quite tedious again, with numerous cases, but it is still by brutally walking through the structure of one-step evaluation and finding the needed redex.

  
well_founded head_inst_nostep
 
y: ty
o: obs_op y
B: ty
m: obs_op B
Γ: neg_ctx
v: val_n Γ y
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
i: Γ ∋ B
t0: is_var v -> T0
i0: evalₒ (v ⊙ o ⦗ a ⦘) ≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

    
p: pre_ty pos
o: obs_op `+ p
B: ty
m: obs_op B
Γ: neg_ctx
v: val Γ `+ p
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
i: Γ ∋ B
t0: is_var v -> T0
i0: evalₒ (v ⊙ o ⦗ a ⦘) ≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

o: obs_op `+ p
B: ty
m: obs_op B
Γ: neg_ctx
v: val Γ `+ p
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> Γ
i: Γ ∋ B
t0: is_var v -> T0
i0: evalₒ (v ⊙ o ⦗ a ⦘) ≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

o: obs_op `- p
B: ty
m: obs_op B

i: Γ ∋ B
t0: is_var v -> T0
i0: evalₒ (v ⊙ o ⦗ a ⦘) ≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

B: ty
m: obs_op B
Γ: neg_ctx
a: dom (PVarN 1) =[ val_n ]> Γ
i: Γ ∋ B

≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)
A0, B0: pre_ty pos

  (Cut pos (Whn (TenR w w0))
     (a `- (A0 ⊗ B0) Ctx.top))
≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ m)

  (Cut pos (Whn (ShiftPR t1))

Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)
B: ty
m: obs_op B
Γ: neg_ctx
s: state (Γ ▶ₓ (`+ ⊥) †)
a: dom PBot =[ val_n ]> Γ
i: Γ ∋ B
i0: evalₒ (Cut neg (Mu s) (Whn BotL))
≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)
A2, B1: pre_ty neg
p2: pat `- A2
p3: pat `- B1
B: ty
m: obs_op B
Γ: neg_ctx
s: state (Γ ▶ₓ (`+ (A2 ⅋ B1)) †)
a: dom (PPar p2 p3) =[ val_n ]> Γ
i: Γ ∋ B
i0: evalₒ
  (Cut neg (Mu s)
     (Whn
        (ParL (p2 `ᵥ⊛ᵣ r_cover_l cover_cat `ᵥ⊛ a)

≊ ret_delay (i ⋅ projT2 (t,' o))

    all: apply it_eq_step in i0; cbn in i0; dependent elimination i0.
Qed.

Final theorem

We have finished instanciating our generic OGS construction on the System D calculus. For good measure we give here the concrete instanciation of the soundness theorem, stating that bisimilarity of the OGS strategies substitution equivalence.

Definition subst_eq (Δ : neg_ctx) {Γ} : relation (state Γ) :=
  fun u v => forall (σ : Γ =[val]> Δ), evalₒ (u ₜ⊛ σ : state_n Δ) ≈ evalₒ (v ₜ⊛ σ : state_n Δ) .
Notation "x ≈⟦sub Δ ⟧≈ y" := (subst_eq Δ x y) (at level 50).


Δ, Γ: neg_ctx
x, y: state Γ
x ≈⟦ogs Δ ⟧≈ y -> x ≈⟦sub Δ ⟧≈ y

  exact (ogs_correction _ x y).
Qed.

Finally it does not cost much to recover the more standard CIU equivalence, which we derive here for the case of terms (not co-terms).

Definition c_of_t {Γ : neg_ctx} {A : pre_ty pos} (t : term Γ `+A)
           : state_n (Γ ▶ₛ {| sub_elt := `-A ; sub_prf := stt |}) :=
  Cut _ (t_shift1 _ t) (Whn (Var Ctx.top)) .
Notation "'name⁺'" := c_of_t.

Definition a_of_sk {Γ Δ : neg_ctx} {A : pre_ty pos} (s : Γ =[val]> Δ) (k : term Δ `-A)
  : (Γ ▶ₛ {| sub_elt := `-A ; sub_prf := stt |}) =[val_n]> Δ :=
  [ s ,ₓ k : val Δ `-A ].


Γ, Δ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty pos
t: term Γ `+ A
s: Γ =[ val ]> Δ
k: term Δ `- A
Cut pos (t `ₜ⊛ s) k = name⁺ t ₜ⊛ a_of_sk s k


Γ, Δ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty pos
t: term Γ `+ A
s: Γ =[ val ]> Δ
k: term Δ `- A
Cut pos (t `ₜ⊛ s) k = name⁺ t ₜ⊛ a_of_sk s k

  cbn; f_equal; unfold t_shift1; rewrite t_sub_ren; now apply t_sub_eq.
Qed.

Definition ciu_eq (Δ : neg_ctx) {Γ} {A : pre_ty pos} : relation (term Γ `+A) :=
  fun u v =>
    forall (σ : Γ =[val]> Δ) (k : term Δ `-A),
      evalₒ (Cut _ (u `ₜ⊛ σ) k : state_n Δ) ≈ evalₒ (Cut _ (v `ₜ⊛ σ) k : state_n Δ) .
Notation "x ≈⟦ciu Δ ⟧⁺≈ y" := (ciu_eq Δ x y) (at level 50).


Δ, Γ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty pos
x, y: term Γ `+ A
name⁺ x ≈⟦ogs Δ ⟧≈ name⁺ y -> x ≈⟦ciu Δ ⟧⁺≈ y

  
Δ, Γ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty pos
x, y: term Γ `+ A
H: name⁺ x ≈⟦ogs Δ ⟧≈ name⁺ y
σ: Γ =[ val ]> Δ
k: term Δ `- A
evalₒ (name⁺ x ₜ⊛ a_of_sk σ k)
≈ evalₒ (name⁺ y ₜ⊛ a_of_sk σ k)

  now apply subst_correct.
Qed.
